enum_values.name: NoEvent
enum_values.description: No analog watchdog x event occurred (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the analog watchdog x event flag

enum_values.name: NotComplete
enum_values.description: Injected conversion sequence not complete (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the injected conversion sequence flag

enum_values.name: NotComplete
enum_values.description: Injected channel conversion not complete (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the injected channel conversion flag

enum_values.name: NoOverrun
enum_values.description: No overrun occurred (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: NotComplete
enum_values.description: Regular conversions sequence not complete (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the regular conversion sequence flag

enum_values.name: NotComplete
enum_values.description: Regular channel conversion not complete (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the regular channel conversion flag

enum_values.name: NotAtEnd
enum_values.description: Not at the end of the sampling phase (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: ADC not yet ready to start conversion (or the flag event was already acknowledged and cleared by software)

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: ADC is ready to start conversion

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: JEOS interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the JEOS bit is set.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: JEOC interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the JEOC bit is set.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Overrun interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the OVR bit is set.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: EOS interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the EOS bit is set.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: EOC interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the EOC bit is set.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: EOSMP interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the EOSMP bit is set.

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: ADRDY interrupt enabled. An interrupt is generated when the ADRDY bit is set.

enum_values.name: CalFactor7
enum_values.description: Calibration factor 7 and (write access only) internal offset

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Writing ADCAL launches a calibration without the linearity calibration

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Writing ADCAL launches a calibration with he linearity calibration

enum_values.name: NotStopped
enum_values.description: No ADC stop injected conversion command ongoing

enum_values.name: NotStopping
enum_values.description: No ADC stop regular conversion command ongoing

enum_values.name: NotActive
enum_values.description: No ADC injected conversion is ongoing

enum_values.name: Active
enum_values.description: ADC is operating and eventually converting an injected channel

enum_values.name: NotActive
enum_values.description: No ADC regular conversion is ongoing

enum_values.name: Active
enum_values.description: ADC is operating and eventually converting a regular channel

enum_values.name: InProgress
enum_values.description: An ADDIS command is in progress

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 disabled on injected channels

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on injected channels

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 disabled on regular channels

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on regular channels

enum_values.name: AllChannels
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on all channels

enum_values.name: SingleChannel
enum_values.description: Analog watchdog 1 enabled on a single channel

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode on injected channels disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode on injected channels enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode for regular channels disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Discontinuous mode for regular channels enabled

enum_values.name: Preserve
enum_values.description: ADC_DR register is preserved with the old data when an overrun is detected

enum_values.name: Overwrite
enum_values.description: ADC_DR register is overwritten with the last conversion result when an overrun is detected

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection disabled (conversions can be launched by software)

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection on the rising edge

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection on the falling edge

enum_values.name: BothEdges
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection on both the rising and falling edges

enum_values.name: DR
enum_values.description: Store output data in DR only

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Sampling time control trigger mode disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Sampling time control trigger mode enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Software trigger starts the conversion for sampling time control trigger mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Software trigger starts the sampling for sampling time control trigger mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Bulb sampling mode enabled. The sampling period starts just after the previous end of the conversion.

enum_values.name: Continued
enum_values.description: When injected conversions are triggered, the oversampling is temporary stopped and continued after the injection sequence (oversampling buffer is maintained during injected sequence)

enum_values.name: Resumed
enum_values.description: When injected conversions are triggered, the current oversampling is aborted and resumed from start after the injection sequence (oversampling buffer is zeroed by injected sequence start)

enum_values.name: Automatic
enum_values.description: All oversampled conversions for a channel are done consecutively following a trigger

enum_values.name: Triggered
enum_values.description: Each oversampled conversion for a channel needs a new trigger

enum_values.name: NotPreselected
enum_values.description: Input channel x is not preselected for conversion, the ADC conversion of this channel shows a wrong result.

enum_values.name: Preselected
enum_values.description: Input channel x is preselected for conversion

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection disabled (conversions can be launched by software)

enum_values.name: RisingEdge
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection on the rising edge

enum_values.name: FallingEdge
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection on the falling edge

enum_values.name: BothEdges
enum_values.description: Hardware trigger detection on both the rising and falling edges

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Offset is subtracted maintaining data integrity and extending converted data size (9-bit and 15-bit signed format)

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Offset is subtracted and result is saturated to maintain converted data size

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Offset is subtracted maintaining data integrity and keeping converted data size

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Offset is subtracted and result is saturated to maintain converted data size

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Gain compensation enabled and applied to all channels

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: ADC analog input channel x is not monitored by AWDy

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: ADC analog input channel x is monitored by AWDy

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: ADC analog input channel x is not monitored by AWDy

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: ADC analog input channel x is monitored by AWDy

enum_values.name: Detections2
enum_values.description: Two consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: Detections3
enum_values.description: Three consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: Detections4
enum_values.description: Four consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: Detections5
enum_values.description: Five consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: Detections6
enum_values.description: Six consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: Detections7
enum_values.description: Seven consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: Detections8
enum_values.description: Eight consecutive detections generates an AWDx flag or an interrupt

enum_values.name: SingleEnded
enum_values.description: ADC analog input channel x is configured in single-ended mode

enum_values.name: Differential
enum_values.description: ADC analog input channel x is configured in differential mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Calibration factor available in CALFACT[31:0] bits, the calibration factor index being defined by CALINDEX[3:0] bits

enum_values.name: Latch
enum_values.description: Calibration factor latched in the analog block on LATCH_COEF bit transition from 0 to 1. Prior to latching the calibration factor, CALFACT[31:0] bits must be programmed with the content of CALINDEX[3:0] bits.
